fields.lane: two-Mac distributed layer-sharding SERVE (master 0..15 local 16GB M4, worker 15..30 + head on the second 16GB M4, wire over ssh-tunneled TCP)
fields.results: model-promotion-smoke-bundle passed=true end-to-end through the distributed lane: load (390s incl. 13.4GB receipt hash + master shard), /v1/completions, /v1/chat/completions, capabilities expectations (row gemma4_26b_a4b_it_q4_0, status supported_exact_row_smoke, contract_supported true, WebUI chat enabled), generation timings, frontend WebUI closure with 9 visible streaming updates
fields.caveats: A4B MoE QAT (Q4_0 experts + Q6_K head); two-Mac distributed lane ONLY (13.4GB memory-infeasible single-node on 16GB); validation cadence only, not a perf claim

claim_boundary: Exact-row text-token generation within the checked basic_v1 prompt pack and API smoke envelope only. No bounded-context promotion, no performance claim beyond the raw logs, no multimodal input (fails closed with a typed error), no neighboring-row or Gemma-family support, no shared-memory claim (distributed mode is layer sharding).
